title: 10 best herbal teas for flu
intro_desc: Herbal teas for flu are a natural remedy that help alleviate symptoms of influenza by boosting the immune system, reducing fever, and soothing a sore throat. The best herbal teas for flu include Echinacea purpurea, Sambucus nigra, Zingiber officinale, Eucalyptus globulus, Thymus vulgaris, Echinacea angustifolia, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Ginkgo biloba, Rosmarinus officinalis, and Melissa officinalis. If not treated with these remedies, flu can lead to missed work or school, fatigue, and in severe cases, pneumonia or bronchitis, significantly impacting daily life and overall well-being.
